name: Hot and Sour Shrimp Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 Lemongrass stalks, cut into 2-inch pieces and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell the shrimp and rinse them. Cut each shrimp in half horizontally and remove any sand veins.
2. Heat a large pot until hot, then add oil and swirl to coat the surface. Add shrimp shells and cook for about 30 seconds until they turn pink.
3. Add broth, lemongrass, lime peel, and chile. Bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
4. Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve, discarding seasonings. Return the strained broth to the pot and bring to a simmer.
5. Add shrimp and straw mushrooms. Cook until shrimp turn pink, about 2 minutes.
6. Stir in lime juice and fish sauce. Serve hot in individual soup bowls, garnished with sliced green onions, chopped cilantro, chopped mint leaves, and sliced chile.
